question: Q6: Bonus Questions

sections.prompt: Raise your hand if you’ve ever stopped a monetization experiment because it didn’t work.
sections.hint: A model, tool, or test you tried and later removed
no_hands: Why do you think many of us avoid experiments?
If you had to try something bold, what would you test first?
What would make it easier for you to experiment?
hands_up: What did you test and stop, and why?
What did you learn from ending it?
Did you replace it with something that worked better?
follow_ups: Who had the reverse experience — an experiment that succeeded unexpectedly?
Who tried a very small change that made a big difference?

sections.prompt: Raise your hand if you’ve learned a big lesson about monetization the hard way.
sections.hint: Something you would warn others about — technical, business, or user-related
no_hands: What do you expect will be the hardest part of monetization for you?
What advice would you want to hear from someone experienced?
hands_up: What lesson did you learn the hard way?
How did it change how you design apps?
What would you warn newcomers about?
follow_ups: Who else faced the same thing?
Who has a very different lesson worth sharing?

sections.prompt: Raise your hand if you believe app monetization will look very different in the next 5 years.
sections.hint: For example AI-driven, new store rules, or new payment methods
no_hands: Why do you think monetization will stay mostly the same?
hands_up: What changes do you expect in the next few years?
How are you preparing for those changes?
What new tools or models interest you most?
follow_ups: Who disagrees and thinks nothing much will change?
Who has a bold prediction to share?

sections.model: Monetization in the Age of AI
sections.prompt: Raise your hand if you use AI tools — for example, coding assistants like Copilot, or AI features in your app.
sections.hint: Tools that help write code, or personalize the user experience
no_hands: Why haven’t you used AI yet — too early, too costly, or not useful?
If you could, what part of monetization would you want AI to improve?
hands_up: How has AI changed how you build or monetize apps?
Did it help you move faster or add new models?
What challenges came with AI tools?
follow_ups: Has anyone seen AI create new costs that hurt monetization?
Who believes AI will open up completely new revenue models?
What’s one AI idea you’d love to test?

wrap_up: What’s the single best monetization tip you’ve ever heard?
If you had to give one piece of advice to a new Flutter dev, what would it be?
What matters more: the model you choose, or how you execute it?
